message:
feat(tui): add DbWarmupState enum for three-state DB readiness tracking

Replace the boolean db_ready flag in StartupSignalState with a
DbWarmupState enum (Pending/Ready/Failed) so the deferred background
worker thread can distinguish between "DB warmup hasn't finished yet"
and "DB warmup failed" — previously a failed warmup left the flag at
false indefinitely, causing the deferred workers to block until timeout.

- Add mark_db_warmup_failed() to unblock the deferred worker thread
  immediately on warmup failure instead of waiting for the grace period
- Add db_warmup_state() and wait_for_db_warmup() accessors that return
  the enum directly for callers that need to distinguish failure from
  pending
- Preserve wait_for_db_ready() as a convenience that returns bool for
  callers that only care about success
- Update MCP config ports to 8877 (concurrent with prior commit)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
